ddls:
CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of item (e.g., product, service) */,
  "item_category" TEXT /* Category of the item (e.g., electronics, clothing) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the item */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Stock quantity of the item */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier of the item */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the item */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the item was added to the platform */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being interacted with */,
  "impressions" INTEGER /* Number of impressions for the item */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks on the item */,
  "clicked_displayed_positions" TEXT /* Positions where the item was clicked and displayed */,
  "avg_impressed_position" REAL /* Average position where the item was impressed */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session where the interaction occurred */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who interacted with the item */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_time" TEXT /* Time of the interaction */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for the interaction */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country from which the interaction occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_interactions_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_interactions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* User preferences (e.g., email notifications, dark mode) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the session */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the session */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the session */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for the session */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country from which the session occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_item_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session where the interaction occurred */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being interacted with */,
  "impressions" INTEGER /* Number of impressions for the item */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks on the item */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_time" TEXT /* Time of the interaction */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for the interaction */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country from which the interaction occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_item_interactions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_item_interactions_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time of the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being displayed */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position where the item was displayed */,
  "display_date" TEXT /* Date when the item was displayed */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session where the position was recorded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who interacted with the item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the position was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_positions_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_positions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_positions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_clicks" (
  "click_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each click */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being clicked */,
  "click_date" TEXT /* Date when the item was clicked */,
  "click_position" INTEGER /* Position where the item was clicked */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session where the click occurred */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who clicked the item */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_time" TEXT /* Time of the interaction */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for the click */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country from which the click occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("click_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_clicks_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_clicks_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_clicks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_demographics" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the demographic data was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time of the demographic data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_performance" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "click_through_rate" REAL /* Click-through rate for the item */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate for the item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the performance metrics were recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time of the performance metrics */,
  "impression_count" INTEGER /* Total number of impressions */,
  "click_count" INTEGER /* Total number of clicks */,
  "conversion_count" INTEGER /* Total number of conversions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the session */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the session */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the session */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for the session */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country from which the session occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_revenue" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated by the item */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the revenue was generated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the revenue data was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time of the revenue data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)
